services.name: pub.pdf:htmlToPdf
description: WmPublic. Converts HTML to a PDF.

input_parameters.name: data
description: HTML that you want to convert to PDF. Specify string or stream.

children.name: string
description: Optional. HTML to convert to PDF.

children.name: stream
description: Optional. HTML to convert to PDF.

input_parameters.name: xslStyleSheet
description: To use a different stylesheet for the conversion, specify either bytes or stream.

children.name: bytes
description: Optional. The XSLT style sheet that the service uses to convert the HTML.

children.name: stream
description: Optional. The XSLT style sheet that the service uses to conver the HTML.

input_parameters.name: loadAs
description: - bytes to return the PDF as a byte[ ]. Select this option to use the resulting PDF as input to a service that operates on whole documents. This is the default.
- stream to return the PDF as a java.io.InputStream. Select this option to use the resulting PDF as input to a service that can process a document incrementally.

output_parameters.name: pdfData
description: A document (IData object) containing the PDF converted from HTML.

children.name: bytes
description: Conditional. PDF data as a byte[ ]. bytes is returned only when the loadAs input parameter is set to bytes.

children.name: stream
description: Conditional. PDF data as an InputStream. Returned when the loadAs input parameter is set to stream.

usage_notes: The pub.pdf:htmlToPdf service cleans up malformed HTML such as tags that are not closed, missing quotation marks, and improperly structured elements. Then, the service parses the resulting HTML and creates a PDF. However, if the HTML is still malformed after the service cleans it up and the HTML cannot be parsed, the service ends with an exception.

The default XSLT stylesheet provided with pub.pdf:htmlToPdf is a general-purpose stylesheet. The stylesheet does not cover every possible HTML structure or formatting requirement. Different types of documents, such as invoices, reports, letters, or legal documents, might require their own custom stylesheet to ensure proper layout, styling, and formatting in the generated PDF.

services.name: pub.pdf:signPdf
description: WmPublic. Applies a digital signature to a PDF.
The pub.pdf:signPdf service generates a detached Cryptographic message Syntax (CMS) signature to help ensure authenticity and integrity.

input_parameters.name: data
description: PDF that you want to sign. Specify bytes or stream.

children.name: bytes
description: Optional. PDF data as a byte[ ].

children.name: stream
description: Optional. PDF data as an InputStream.

input_parameters.name: name
description: Optional. Name of the person or authority who is signing the document. The pub.pdf:signPdf service embeds the name in the signature.

input_parameters.name: contactInfo
description: Optional. Contact information for the signer. Recipients can use the contact information to contact the signer to verify the signature. The pub.pdf:signPdf service embeds the contact information in the signature.

input_parameters.name: reason
description: Optional. Reason for signing. The pub.pdf:signPdf service embeds the reason in the signature.

input_parameters.name: keystoreAlias
description: Alias for the keystore that contains the private key to use to sign the PDF.

input_parameters.name: keyAlias
description: Alias for the private key to use to sign the PDF.

input_parameters.name: loadAs
description: - bytes to return the PDF as a byte[ ]. Select this option to use the resulting PDF as input to a service that operates on whole documents. This is the default.
- stream to return the PDF as a java.io.InputStream. Select this option to use the resulting PDF as input to a service that can process a document incrementally.

output_parameters.name: signedPDF
description: A document (IData object) containing the signed PDF.

children.name: bytes
description: Conditional. Signed PDF as a byte[ ]. bytes is returned only when the loadAs input parameter is set to bytes.

children.name: stream
description: Conditional. Signed PDF as an InputStream. Returned when the loadAs input parameter is set to stream.
